div.class: frame text-skin-base bg-skin-frame border-skin-frame relative m-1 origin-top-left whitespace-nowrap border rounded
header text-skin-title bg-skin-title border-skin-frame border-b p-1 flex justify-between rounded-t

div.data-tooltip: We (the vendor) do not have access to your data. The diagram is generated in this browser.

span.class: flex items-center justify-center fill-current h-6 w-6 m-auto

div.class: zenuml sequence-diagram relative box-border text-left overflow-visible px-2.5 default origin-top-left
life-line-layer lifeline-layer z-30 absolute h-full flex flex-col top-0 pt-2
div.style: min-width: auto; width: calc(100% + 0px); pointer-events: none;

div.class: lifeline absolute flex flex-col h-full transform -translate-x-1/2
participant bg-skin-participant shadow-participant border-skin-participant text-skin-participant rounded text-base leading-4 flex flex-col justify-center z-10 h-10 top-8

label.title: Click to edit
label.class: name leading-4 right px-1 editable-label-base cursor-pointer

div.class: line w0 mx-auto flex-grow w-px bg-[linear-gradient(to_bottom,transparent_50%,var(--color-border-base)_50%)] bg-[length:1px_10px]
lifeline absolute flex flex-col h-full transform -translate-x-1/2
participant bg-skin-participant shadow-participant border-skin-participant text-skin-participant rounded text-base leading-4 flex flex-col justify-center z-10 h-10 top-8

label.class: name leading-4 right px-1 editable-label-base cursor-pointer

div.class: line w0 mx-auto flex-grow w-px bg-[linear-gradient(to_bottom,transparent_50%,var(--color-border-base)_50%)] bg-[length:1px_10px]
interaction async right-to-left text-left text-sm text-skin-message
message leading-none border-skin-message-arrow border-b-2 flex items-end flex-row-reverse right-to-left
point text-skin-message-arrow open right-to-left flex-shrink-0 transform translate-y-1/2 -my-px
absolute text-xs right-[100%] top-0 pr-1 group-hover:hidden text-gray-500 font-thin
interaction async left-to-right text-left text-sm text-skin-message
message leading-none border-skin-message-arrow border-b-2 flex items-end
point text-skin-message-arrow open flex-shrink-0 transform translate-y-1/2 -my-px
absolute text-xs right-[100%] top-0 pr-1 group-hover:hidden text-gray-500 font-thin

div.style: position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; transform: translate(0px, 0px);

div.class: footer rounded text-skin-control bg-skin-title px-4 py-1 flex justify-between items-center gap-3
